editor.layoutHint: Change position and size by dragging on the grid.
editor.containerDropHint: Drop widgets here or add from the palette while this container is selected.
editor.layerHint: Higher Z-index draws on top. Overlapping widgets can stack for HMI overlays.
editor.selectWidgetHint: Select a widget on the grid or add a new one. Delete — remove selected.
editor.stylesHint: Element keys: {{keys}}. CSS in camelCase. Empty — use defaults.
palette.dragHint: Drag a widget by its background; resize from the bottom-right corner
palette.title: Widgets
settings.refreshIntervalHint: Stored in the dashboard object's refreshIntervalMs variable
settings.title: Dashboard settings
rules.title: Platform rules
rules.hint: CEL rules on this dashboard object: context, widget visibility, events. Same engine as object bindings.
editor.deprecation.payloadFilterExpr: Legacy mini-DSL. Prefer Platform rules (Rules tab) with CEL condition on event payload.
editor.deprecation.requireSessionParamsJ: Legacy gate. Prefer Platform rules with CEL on context.params.* before showing or enabling actions.
haystackBind.title: Bind widgets by Haystack query
haystackBind.intro: Search points under a subtree by Haystack filter or tag checkboxes (AND). Adds value widgets for each match.
haystackBind.filterHint: Example: equip and point and temp
